app_release_notes: v0.16.11 - Workbook hygiene after the v0.16.10 walk. Powder Charge Log hero now shows Vert SD alongside Mean Radius, matching the Seating Depth hero. Every hover-over tooltip in every sheet now shows its full text instead of clipping at the Excel default size. Shot columns on Powder Charge Log and Seating Depth Log are uniform width (Shot 4 was 60% wider than the others). OAL on row 10 is now a yellow editable cell with a comparator-vs-caliper tooltip - was a hardcoded number with nowhere to type your own after the Setup form was simplified. Garmin Xero Import and BallisticX Import sheets now mirror the shot and group data from the real session log so the ladder rows are populated instead of empty.
